overall.description: A continuous walkthrough of the Temple of Heracles in ancient Greece, transitioning from the ornate interior to the sunlit exterior gardens during golden hour. The player character explores the sacred grounds, passing statues, burning braziers, and NPCs engaged in prayer and rest.

events.description: approaching the bright exterior light visible through the lattice doorway

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the temple interior toward the exit doorway

entered.detail: fluted stone columns with decorative capitals lining the interior
deep teal painted walls with red and gold decorative friezes near the ceiling
tall wooden door with geometric lattice pattern opening to exterior

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside the Temple of Heracles, characterized by ornate fluted columns, teal painted walls with decorative borders, and a marble floor. The camera moves forward toward a large lattice-screened doorway that reveals bright exterior light, creating a dramatic contrast between the dim interior and sunlit outside.

events.description: exits the temple interior through the lattice doorway into the exterior portico
passes the burning stone brazier and turns slightly left

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the temple and walking past the large Heracles statue toward the garden

notable_agents.action: standing still near the Heracles statue, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large stone statue of Heracles holding a club, positioned between columns
circular stone fire pit with flames burning brightly
large fabric awning with red and white geometric patterns hanging between columns

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the temple into a columned portico where a massive Heracles statue stands. The scene transitions from artificial to natural golden-hour lighting. The camera passes a burning stone brazier and moves under a decorative hanging tapestry, revealing the temple's exterior architecture and a glimpse of the gardens beyond.

events.description: turns left along the stone steps, following the temple exterior wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone pathway beside the temple, passing seated NPCs on benches

notable_agents.action: two figures sitting on a stone bench conversing in the shade

entered.detail: wide stone staircase ascending along the temple exterior wall
tall slender evergreen trees lining the garden path
mature olive tree with gnarled trunk providing shade

segments.scene_description: Moving along the temple's exterior, the camera follows a cobblestone path lined with stone steps on the left and garden benches on the right. Tall cypress trees and a large olive tree provide greenery against the warm golden-hour light. NPCs sit on benches in quiet conversation as the camera progresses deeper into the sacred garden.

events.description: approaches the female statue and praying figures in the garden clearing
camera circles around the praying figures to view the statue from different angles

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the praying figures to observe the votive statue, moving slowly around the scene

notable_agents.action: two robed figures standing with hands clasped in prayer before the statue

entered.detail: tall bronze or stone statue of a woman in flowing green robes holding a vessel
ancient stone perimeter wall with crenellations visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a sacred grove where a tall female votive statue stands amidst dense shrubs. Two robed NPCs stand in prayer before the statue, their hands clasped reverently. The camera circles around this scene, capturing the backlit figures against the setting sun, with the ancient stone walls of the sanctuary visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple approach path with flower planters

events.description: resumes forward movement away from the praying figures toward the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the garden path, moving away from the statue area toward the main temple entrance

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking along the path in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large rectangular planters with vibrant pink and red flowers

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the sacred grove, continuing along the cobblestone path lined with flower-filled planters. The Heracles statue becomes visible again in the distance, marking the return toward the temple entrance area. The path is bordered by stone walls and ancient architecture, with the warm sunlight casting long shadows across the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, ornate interior of the Temple of Heracles into the expansive, sun-drenched sacred gardens during the golden hour. It begins amidst fluted columns and teal walls, moving forward toward a lattice-screened doorway that floods the space with bright exterior light. As the camera exits into the portico, the lighting shifts to a warm natural glow, passing a massive Heracles statue and a burning stone brazier before gliding under a decorative tapestry. The scene then expands onto a cobblestone path lined with cypress and olive trees, where the camera drifts past NPCs resting on garden benches before entering a sacred grove to circle around robed figures praying before a female votive statue. Finally, the camera moves away from the grove along flower-filled planters, turning back toward the distant Heracles statue as long shadows stretch across the ancient stone architecture.
